narrative:
Cuy Falls 3-D (precinct in Summit County) has 980 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.1 percentage points.
